title: nama hispida var. tenuis
intro: Nama hispida var. tenuis, also known as Slender Foothill or Slender Nama, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and is characterized by its small, blue-violet flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
